---
title: "IChO 2026 Preparatory Problems — Solutions"
subtitle: "58th International Chemistry Olympiad · Uzbekistan · 2026"
date: today
listing:
  id: problem-listing
  contents: "parts/**/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [problem-id, title, status, difficulty, topics, date]
  field-display-names:
    problem-id: "#"
    title: "Title"
    status: "Status"
    difficulty: "Diff."
    topics: "Topics"
    date: "Updated"
  field-types:
    problem-id: number
    difficulty: number
    date: date
  date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
  sort: ["problem-id asc"]
  sort-ui: [problem-id, title, status, difficulty, date]
  filter-ui: [title, status, topics]
  categories: numbered
  page-size: 100
  table-striped: true
  table-hover: true
---

## What's on this site

Worked solutions to the **30 theoretical problems** of the 58th IChO Preparatory Problems — these are **Part 2** of the official booklet. The dashboard at the bottom of this page is the main entry point; each row links to a bilingual solution + pedagogical analysis.

For the official syllabus and reference tables — *Fields of Advanced Difficulty*, physical constants, formulae, the IChO 2026 periodic table — see the **[Syllabus](syllabus.qmd)** page (this is Part 1 of the booklet, reproduced for reference). The **Part 3 lab practicals are not covered on this site**; if you need them, see the official PDFs.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
These solutions are **work in progress and unofficial**. They have no affiliation with the IChO organizing committee. If you find an error, a sharper derivation, or a missing edge case, please post on Discord with the **problem number** and the **step** you're commenting on.

[💬 Discuss on Discord →](https://discord.gg/CHANGE-ME){.discord-cta}
:::

## Status legend

<span class="status-badge status-not-started">Not started</span> &nbsp;
<span class="status-badge status-draft">Draft</span> &nbsp;
<span class="status-badge status-revised">Revised</span> &nbsp;
<span class="status-badge status-final">Final</span> &nbsp;
<span class="status-badge status-tbc">TBC</span>

- **Draft** — first pass complete, internally cross-checked, *not* yet peer-reviewed.
- **Revised** — incorporates at least one round of student or external feedback.
- **Final** — answer key and pedagogical analysis stabilized; no expected changes.
- **TBC** *(to be confirmed)* — known open issue or contested step flagged in the page.

## Problems

::: {#problem-listing}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Decorate the listing's "Status" cells with colored badge spans.
// We do this post-render rather than via the Lua filter because the Lua filter
// only runs per-page, while the listing table is built by scanning raw YAML.
(function () {
  const LABELS = {
    "not-started": "Not started",
    "draft": "Draft",
    "revised": "Revised",
    "final": "Final",
    "tbc": "TBC",
  };
  function decorate() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.listing-status').forEach(el => {
      const raw = (el.textContent || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (!raw) return;
      if (el.dataset.decorated) return;
      const cls = "status-" + raw;
      const label = LABELS[raw] || raw;
      el.innerHTML = '<span class="status-badge ' + cls + '">' + label + '</span>';
      el.dataset.decorated = "1";
    });
  }
  decorate();
  // Re-decorate after List.js (Quarto's listing) re-renders on sort/filter
  document.addEventListener('quarto-listing-loaded', decorate);
  const obs = new MutationObserver(decorate);
  const table = document.querySelector('#problem-listing');
  if (table) obs.observe(table, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();
</script>
```
